nasb.text: Yet the men were very good to us, and we were not insulted, nor did we miss anything as long as we went about with them, while we were in the fields.

esv.text: Yet the men were very good to us, and we suffered no harm, and we did not miss anything when we were in the fields, as long as we went with them.

cnv.text: 但是，那些人對我們很好。我們在田野與他們往來的時候，他們都沒有侮辱我們，我們也從沒有遺失過甚麼。

ccb.text: 大卫的仆人对我们很好，从来不欺负我们。我们跟他们一起在田野的时候，从来没有丢过任何东西。
